note: Temporary exception ledger. Every entry must have owner, reason, removal_batch, and expiry. Goal: zero permanent exceptions.

exceptions.reason: Unity-managed YAML scene — cannot be hand-edited. Builder scripts written: run `just scene-modularize` (requires UNITY_PATH) to decompose into TestTrack.unity + TestTrack-Terrain.unity + TestTrack-Props.unity + TestTrack-Lighting.unity via TrackSceneModularBuilder.ModularizeTestTrack()

Unity-managed YAML scene — cannot be hand-edited. Builder scripts written: run `just scene-modularize` (requires UNITY_PATH) to decompose into OutpostTrack.unity + OutpostTrack-Terrain.unity + OutpostTrack-Lighting.unity via TrackSceneModularBuilder.ModularizeOutpostTrack()

Unity-managed YAML prefab — cannot be hand-edited. Builder scripts written: run `just scene-modularize` (requires UNITY_PATH) to extract nested prefabs (RCBody, WheelFL/FR/RL/RR) via RCBuggyModularBuilder.Run()
Exception ledger file itself — grows with each violation entry; shrinks as violations are resolved
